extraction_reasoning: The litigation tables distinguish matters against the Company, matters by the Company, and matters by/against Group Companies. I counted only the against rows: criminal complaints are Nil for the Company and Group Companies (0); tax proceedings are 5 against the Company plus 12 involving Group Companies (17); no separate statutory/regulatory enforcement category is disclosed, and all civil proceedings are excluded from the requested counts but included in the quantified company/group aggregate. The quantified amount against the Company and Group Companies is ₹2,112.36 million tax proceedings against the Company + ₹41,809.61 million civil proceedings against the Company + ₹5,413.30 million tax proceedings involving Group Companies = ₹49,335.27 million, or ₹4,933.527 crore; the Company’s ₹777.23 million civil proceedings by it are excluded. Contingent liabilities are stated on a consolidated basis as at September 30, 2018; because no Total row is provided, the two disclosed items are summed: ₹37,740.56 million + ₹1.53 million = ₹37,742.09 million, or ₹3,774.209 crore. The 96.11% figure concerns MoR’s share of the order book, not company-wide customer revenue concentration, so top-five and top-ten customer revenue percentages are not disclosed. The source tables use ₹ million; all monetary amounts were converted to crore by dividing by 10.
